source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.8|seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10
distilled_thesis: Before the cup pours out, the route pauses in a request for blessing from a tranquil eye that can behold without envy.
